scoring_manifest.purpose: rank next mechanism experiments from generated evidence
ranking_policy: prefer mechanisms that change byte-to-seed mapping over raw-depth escalation
prefer exact decode paths over transform-only byte shortening
penalize wins that also appear in paired shadows, binary controls, or random controls
block format work until selected exact spans exist after metadata
block hardware work until CPU evidence finds a promoted workload

summary.conclusion: Run seed-table preset probing before raw-depth escalation, format promotion, descriptor packing, or hardware acceleration.

rankings.title: Canonical seed-table / Lotus preset probe
rankings.evidence_signal: Uniform cryptographic expanders currently have zero selected spans, so the strongest next question is whether a frozen public corpus-shaped codebook changes the byte-to-seed distribution.
rankings.material_difference: Changes the deterministic expander/codebook instead of transforming target bytes or searching deeper through the same random-looking SHA/BLAKE output space.
rankings.promotion_gate: Freeze discovery and held-out splits before table construction; require ordinary_heldout_negative_groups >= 3, control_negative_groups == 0, exact decode from preset/version metadata only, and improvement beyond equivalent random-trial scaling.
rankings.stop_rule: Stop if held-out wins disappear, controls win similarly, selected spans remain zero, or gains require training on the same file being compressed.
rankings.control_penalty: High unless random, binary, compressed, and vocabulary-shadow controls stay null.

rankings.title: Exact short-hit bundle economics
rankings.evidence_signal: Alignment/arity discovery has 3480 verified exact short hits, but 0 positive exact hits and zero selected spans under current byte-heavy records.
rankings.material_difference: Uses already verified exact hits and attacks shared offset/seed/config overhead instead of spending more seed search.
rankings.promotion_gate: Only use pre-existing verified hits; require full-stream negative delta after all shared table/checksum/config bytes and at least two unrelated ordinary held-out groups.
rankings.stop_rule: Stop if the zero-overhead lower bound is not negative or controls show comparable short-hit density.
rankings.control_penalty: High because current exact hits are short, unprofitable, and control-like.

rankings.title: Whole-stream residual vector probe
rankings.evidence_signal: Residual payload coders produced 1 measured held-out negative row, but frozen packed replication has 0 ordinary held-out negative groups.
rankings.material_difference: Tests global residual entropy and bitplane/vector channels instead of narrow prefix-suffix residual sidecars.
rankings.promotion_gate: Require exact decode, corrupt rejection, all residual/offset/seed metadata charged, ordinary_heldout_negative_groups >= 3, controls null, and measured residual coding near the entropy bound.
rankings.stop_rule: Stop if residual entropy remains random-like, replication stays at zero negative ordinary groups, or per-file tuning exceeds savings.
rankings.control_penalty: Medium-high because the latest packed replication matrix is null.

rankings.title: Expander salt / preset ensemble
rankings.evidence_signal: Current BLAKE3/SHA-256 style uniform outputs have no selected spans; a predeclared salt/preset ensemble tests whether low-cost manifold rotation beats the expected random-trial multiplier.
rankings.material_difference: Adds a file/layer-level expander selector instead of longer seeds; selector cost is charged once.
rankings.promotion_gate: Predeclare presets, charge preset IDs, compare against equivalent extra random trials, and require selected exact spans after metadata.
rankings.stop_rule: Stop if gains match only the random-trial multiplier or full-stream negative rows remain absent.
rankings.control_penalty: Medium because multiple uniform functions can mimic extra depth.

rankings.title: Schema-native public dictionaries
rankings.evidence_signal: Simple grammar/token/record channels have zero exact selected spans, but public versioned schema dictionaries may test a stronger corpus-shaped preset without per-file training.
rankings.material_difference: Uses frozen public schema dictionaries as generator presets rather than storing per-file grammar sidecars.
rankings.promotion_gate: Freeze schema preset, forbid held-out leakage, require unrelated held-out files in the schema family to shrink, and paired shadow vocab controls to stay null.
rankings.stop_rule: Stop if renamed/shadow controls perform the same or schema metadata eats all savings.
rankings.control_penalty: Medium-high because prior simple grammar/token lanes are null.

rankings.title: Candidate lattice telemetry
rankings.evidence_signal: The current engine uses weighted non-overlap selection, but the whitepaper superposition claim needs retained/rejected candidate telemetry before wider research can be trusted.
rankings.material_difference: Improves auditability and selection correctness rather than hit rate.
rankings.promotion_gate: A deterministic overlap fixture shows retained alternatives beating greedy selection, with every discarded candidate explained.
rankings.stop_rule: Keep as correctness work only if it does not change selected spans or reveal missed profitable alternatives.
rankings.control_penalty: Low for correctness; not natural-corpus proof.

rankings.title: Recursive v2 structured fixtures
rankings.evidence_signal: Recursive v2 decode exists, but natural recursive gain is still an open claim outside planted or deliberately constructed cases.
rankings.material_difference: Tests the pass-to-pass transformation thesis directly on generated structured fixtures.
rankings.promotion_gate: At least two non-offset fixture families produce smaller verified later layers after all v2 layer metadata is charged.
rankings.stop_rule: Do not generalize recursion if later layers help only planted offset fixtures or disappear at container level.
rankings.control_penalty: Medium because structured fixtures are mechanism proof, not prevalence proof.

rankings.title: Long-span bundle gate
rankings.evidence_signal: Raw-suffix strict gain starts around prefix 6, but current held-out forced prefixes stop before that.
rankings.material_difference: Can amortize metadata only after a stronger frontier supplies candidate spans.
rankings.promotion_gate: Require prefix>=6, exact hits, selected spans, or sub-1-GiB forecast before long-span sweeps run.
rankings.stop_rule: Stay gated while SEARCH_FRONTIER_GATE reports broad raw depth closed and selected spans remain zero.
rankings.control_penalty: High until the frontier gate opens.

rankings.title: Format extension prototype
rankings.evidence_signal: Current selected-span total is 0; format metadata should follow evidence, not manufacture it.
rankings.material_difference: Turns a proved mechanism into a compatibility contract; it is not a discovery mechanism.
rankings.promotion_gate: A mechanism has exact decode, corrupt-input rejection, controls, golden vectors, and at least two unrelated ordinary wins.
rankings.stop_rule: Reject format work while exact selected spans remain absent.
rankings.control_penalty: Very high because format promotion is currently closed.

rankings.title: Hardware streaming pipeline
rankings.evidence_signal: Hardware can reduce runtime only after CPU evidence identifies a profitable selected-span workload.
rankings.promotion_gate: CPU streaming finds repeatable selected spans but misses the archival runtime envelope.
rankings.stop_rule: Stop if GPU output diverges from CPU parity or lacks a promoted workload.
rankings.control_penalty: High cost and low value before hit-rate evidence.
